titles.title: Making appropriations for military construction, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and related agencies for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2027, and for other purposes.
Making appropriations for military construction, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and related agencies for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2027, and for other purposes.

action.text: The House Committee on Appropriations reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-622, by Mr. Carter (TX).

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 539.
